scripts.tauri:build: npm run download-tools && npm run sync-tools && tauri build
scripts.build:portable: npm run download-tools && npm run sync-tools && tauri build && node ../../scripts/package-portable.mjs
scripts.build:commercial: COLLECTIONLOOM_BUILD_FLAVOR=commercial npm run download-tools && npm run sync-tools && tauri build && node ../../scripts/package-portable.mjs
